title: Promise Workers, Backpressure, Abort Propagation, and Clean Drain
description: Promise.all starts the whole frontier, one rejection abandons siblings, streams outlive jobs, and shutdown clears timers without awaiting owned work. Learners cumulatively produce bounded abortable worker pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Admit work through page, origin, byte, memory, browser, file, and report budgets before creating expensive Promises.
Classify per-item failure without losing sibling settlements, aggregate cause, or crawl-level stop conditions.
Propagate capacity from report and storage sinks through parsing, fetch, frontier, and discovery instead of buffering without bound.
